title: cereus tehuacanus
intro: Cereus tehuacanus, also known as the tehuacanus column cactus, is a species of cactus native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cereus tehuacanus include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
